# ctyun_mysql_backups (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10098797





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `backup_id` (Number) 备份集ID
- `end_time` (String) 查询结束时间（格式：2006-01-02 15:04:05）
- `inst_id` (String) MySQL实例ID
- `inst_name` (String) MySQL实例名称
- `name` (String) 备份名称
- `page_no` (Number) 页码，默认1
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数，默认10
- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置
- `start_time` (String) 查询开始时间（格式：2006-01-02 15:04:05）

### Read-Only

- `backup_list` (Attributes List) 备份列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup_list))

<a id="nestedatt--backup_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup_list`

Read-Only:

- `backup_id` (Number) 备份ID
- `inst_id` (String) 实例ID
- `inst_name` (String) 实例名称
- `records` (Attributes List) 备份记录列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup_list--records))

<a id="nestedatt--backup_list--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup_list.records`

Read-Only:

- `backed_up_data_size` (Number) 备份数据大小（字节）
- `backed_up_data_size_human` (String) 备份数据大小（格式化）
- `backup_end_time` (String) 备份结束时间
- `backup_name` (String) 备份名称
- `backup_record_id` (Number) 备份记录ID
- `backup_start_time` (String) 备份开始时间
- `backup_task_id` (Number) 备份任务ID
- `description` (String) 备份描述
- `disabled` (Boolean) 是否禁用
- `op_type` (String) 操作类型（auto/manual）
- `outer_prod_inst_id` (String) 外部产品实例ID
- `prod_inst_name` (String) 产品实例名称
- `storage_type` (String) 存储类型
- `task_id` (String) 任务ID
- `task_status` (Number) 任务状态
- `task_type` (String) 任务类型（full/incr）
